name: Lamball
description: A fluffy Pal covered in wool that wanders meadows aimlessly.
partnerSkill: Fluffy Shield - Can be worn as a shield.

name: Cattiva
description: A mischievous cat-like Pal that secretly collects shiny objects.
partnerSkill: Cat Helper - Increases the player's carrying capacity.

name: Chikipi
description: A small chicken-like Pal that lays eggs regularly and is popular for farming.
partnerSkill: Egg Layer - Regularly produces eggs when assigned to a Ranch.

name: Lifmunk
description: A small squirrel-like Pal that loves red berries and is surprisingly good with firearms.
partnerSkill: Lifmunk Recoil - Mounts on your head and fires a submachine gun.

name: Foxparks
description: A fox-like Fire Pal with flames at the tip of its tail that is curious and mischievous.
partnerSkill: Hugger Flamethrower - Can be wielded as a flamethrower.

name: Foxparks Cryst
description: It is unskilled at controlling cold air from the moment it is born and tends to choke on the frost it breathes unintentionally.
partnerSkill: Huggy Frost - When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

name: Fuack
description: A duck-like Water Pal that can be found near rivers and lakes.
partnerSkill: Aqua Gun - Shoots water while riding.

name: Fuack Ignis
description: With a belly built for friction, this Pal sparks flames as it body surfs. But when it gets carried away, it often ends up a rolling fireball.
partnerSkill: Fire Tackle - When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

name: Sparkit
description: A small Electric Pal shaped like a spark that generates electricity by running in circles.
partnerSkill: Electro Bullet - Shoots electric bolts when the player attacks.

name: Tanzee
description: A monkey-like Leaf Pal that loves to dance and throw things at enemies.
partnerSkill: Tanzee Toss - Tosses grenades while the player fires.

name: Rooby
description: A small kangaroo-like Fire Pal that keeps burning coals in its pouch.
partnerSkill: Rooby Punch - Delivers fiery punches when fighting alongside the player.

name: Pengullet
description: A penguin-like Pal found in cold regions that can shoot itself out of a cannon.
partnerSkill: Pengullet Cannon - Can be loaded into a Pal Cannon.

name: Pengullet Lux
description: The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared, and it can no longer fly. Yet its longing for the sky has turned to jealousy — so it harnessed electricity to strike down those who still soar.
partnerSkill: Pengullet Lux Launcher - When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition.

name: Penking
description: A regal penguin Pal that rules over all penguins with an iron flipper.
partnerSkill: King of Penguins - Boosts work speed of Water-type Pals in the base.

name: Penking Lux
description: Its body changed color after gaining electricity to improve underwater hunting. As a result, it lost the affection of Pengullet but strangely enough, it now has a loyal follower; Pengullet Lux.
partnerSkill: Unyielding Storm Commander - While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

name: Jolthog
description: A hedgehog-like Pal covered in electric spines that rolls into a ball when threatened.
partnerSkill: Electric Ball - Throws Jolthog at enemies to deal Electric damage.

name: Jolthog Cryst
description: An icy variant of Jolthog covered in frost crystals that chills anything it touches.
partnerSkill: Cryst Ball - Throws Jolthog Cryst to freeze enemies.

name: Gumoss
description: A mossy Pal that slowly wanders forests and uses trees as camouflage.
partnerSkill: Gumoss Shield - Provides a leaf shield when fighting.

name: Vixy
description: A small fox Pal that buries treasure in the ground and can dig up items.
partnerSkill: Dig Here! - Digs up items from the ground.

name: Hoocrates
description: An owl Pal that loves philosophy and poses unanswerable questions to confuse enemies.
partnerSkill: Philosopher's Lesson - Temporarily boosts your stats.

name: Teafant
description: A tiny elephant-like Pal that sprays water from its trunk and is gentle and friendly.
partnerSkill: Soothing Shower - Sprays water that slowly heals the player.

name: Depresso
description: A lethargic Pal that always looks downcast but works diligently despite appearances.
partnerSkill: Caffeine Inoculation - Decreases stamina consumption for a time.

name: Cremis
description: A small caterpillar-like Pal wrapped in soft fuzz that is very docile.
partnerSkill: Soft Wool - Produces Wool when assigned to a Ranch.

name: Daedream
description: A dreamlike Dark Pal that hovers silently and feeds on the nightmares of sleeping creatures.
partnerSkill: Dream Chaser - Fights alongside the player at night.

name: Rushoar
description: A boar Pal with powerful tusks that charges at anything that disturbs it.
partnerSkill: Hard Head - Improves performance while mounted.

name: Nox
description: A cat-like Pal that appears at night with glowing eyes in the darkness.
partnerSkill: Shadow Veil - Reduces detection rate during the night.

name: Fuddler
description: A small mole-like Earth Pal that loves to dig through soil searching for ore.
partnerSkill: Ore Finder - Occasionally discovers ore while digging.

name: Killamari
description: A squid-like Dark Pal that lurks in the shadows and strangles prey with its tentacles.
partnerSkill: Grapple Tentacle - Grabs and immobilizes enemies.

name: Killamari Primo
description: It sinks its fangs into the enemy's neck, draining every last drop of blood. When two Killamari Primos latch onto each other, they become locked in a relentless struggle.
partnerSkill: Fried Killamari - While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

name: Mau
description: A small black cat Pal that is said to bring good fortune despite its dark nature.
partnerSkill: Gold Digger - Occasionally digs up Gold Coins.

name: Mau Cryst
description: An icy variant of Mau with crystalline fur that sparkles in moonlight.
partnerSkill: Ice Digger - Occasionally digs up ice crystals.

name: Celaray
description: A manta ray-like Water Pal that glides gracefully through the air.
partnerSkill: Manta Glider - Can be glided on to cross large distances.

name: Celaray Lux
description: Its flashy patterns help it attract a partner. But after a long history of electrocution incidents involving Celaray Lux, yellow-and-black stripes are now seen across the island as a sign of danger.
partnerSkill: Jolt Glider - While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

name: Direhowl
description: A fierce wolf-like Pal that hunts in packs and can be tamed as a swift mount.
partnerSkill: Riding Hound - Can be ridden as a fast land mount.

name: Tocotoco
description: A small bird Pal that launches its own eggs as explosive projectiles.
partnerSkill: Grenade Launcher - Launches explosive eggs at enemies.

name: Flopie
description: A gentle rabbit-like Leaf Pal that is excellent at gathering berries and plants.
partnerSkill: Berry Basket - Increases the yield of gathered berries.

name: Mozzarina
description: A cow-like Pal known for producing high quality milk that is easy to manage at a Ranch.
partnerSkill: Supplying Milk - Produces Milk when assigned to a Ranch.

name: Bristla
description: A thorny plant Pal that uses its sharp bristles to deter predators.
partnerSkill: Thorn Whip - Attacks nearby enemies with sharp thorns.

name: Gobfin
description: A fin-like Water Pal that is surprisingly nimble on land and swims at great speed.
partnerSkill: Brave Sailor - Enhances attacks when fighting alongside the player.

name: Gobfin Ignis
description: A fiery variant of Gobfin that breathes flames and loves to ignite its surroundings.
partnerSkill: Flame Sailor - Enhances fire attacks when fighting alongside the player.

name: Hangyu
description: A small Earth Pal that floats using a leaf like a hang glider.
partnerSkill: Hang Glider - Can be used as a hang glider for the player.

name: Hangyu Cryst
description: An icy variant of Hangyu that glides on frozen air currents.
partnerSkill: Ice Glider - Can be used as an ice hang glider.

name: Mossanda
description: A large panda-like Leaf Pal that fights with a grenade launcher strapped to its arm.
partnerSkill: Grenade Panda - Fires grenades while the player rides it.

name: Mossanda Lux
description: An electric variant of Mossanda that fires electric grenades with lightning precision.
partnerSkill: Electric Grenade Panda - Fires electric grenades while being ridden.

name: Woolipop
description: Its entire body is 18,000 times sweeter than sugar. Carnivorous Pals lured by its scent will find themselves overwhelmed by sweetness and even pass out should they take a bite.
partnerSkill: Candy Pop - Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to the ranch.

name: Caprity
description: The shrub on this Pal's back produces berries as long as it is properly fed. It offers these berries to potential mates, and if the flavor is to their liking, romance blossoms.
partnerSkill: Berry Picker - Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to the ranch.

name: Caprity Noct
description: The berries that grow on its back change flavor according to its emotions. The harsher the environment it grows in, the sweeter the berries become. This is why most Caprity Noct raised in captivity have never known love.
partnerSkill: Venom Picker - Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to the ranch.

name: Eikthyrdeer
description: A majestic deer Pal with antlers shaped like branches that is revered by forest dwellers.
partnerSkill: Nature's Guidance - Increases movement speed in forests.

name: Eikthyrdeer Terra
description: An earthy variant of Eikthyrdeer with stone-like antlers and rocky hide.
partnerSkill: Terra Guidance - Increases movement speed and mining efficiency.

name: Nitewing
description: A large eagle-like Pal capable of carrying a rider that is fast and majestic.
partnerSkill: Aerial Transport - Can be ridden as a flying mount.

name: Ribbuny
description: A cute rabbit-like Pal with ribbon-like ears that is beloved by children.
partnerSkill: Happy Ribbon - Boosts the player's morale in battle.

name: Ribbuny Botan
description: Always wears a cheerful smile. Sometimes, thanks to Cattiva's pranks, they end up tangled in tentacles and have to fight their way out!
partnerSkill: Grass Weaver - Boosts Attack power of Grass-type Pals in team; increases work efficiency at Weapon Workbench when stationed at base.

name: Incineram
description: A demonic Fire Pal with dark markings that burns everything in its path with dark flames.
partnerSkill: Incinerate - Burns enemies with a powerful dark flame attack.

name: Incineram Noct
description: A nocturnal variant of Incineram that is most powerful when darkness falls.
partnerSkill: Dark Incinerate - Attacks with dark energy amplified at night.

name: Cinnamoth
description: A moth Pal with wings that scatter aromatic spores capable of inducing sleep.
partnerSkill: Spore Shower - Scatters sleep-inducing spores on nearby enemies.

name: Arsox
description: A fiery ox Pal with flames streaming from its horns that is territorial and aggressive.
partnerSkill: Volcanic Charge - Sets enemies ablaze when you ride it into them.

name: Dumud
description: A mud-covered Earth Pal that wallows in muddy terrain and has an excellent sense of smell.
partnerSkill: Mud Bath - Slows down enemies by covering them in mud.

name: Dumud Gild
description: Its body reflects light with astounding clarity. Even more shocking, its reflexes are somehow even slower than Dumud.
partnerSkill: Golden Harvest - While in team, increases Attack of Ground Pals. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to the ranch.

name: Cawgnito
description: A crow-like Dark Pal wearing a hat and cape that acts like a spy or detective.
partnerSkill: Shadow Dive - Dives into shadows to ambush enemies.

name: Leezpunk
description: A punky lizard Dark Pal that decorates itself with spikes and paints its scales.
partnerSkill: Punk Charge - Rushes at enemies dealing Dark damage.

name: Leezpunk Ignis
description: A fiery punk lizard Pal that breathes fire and leaves trails of burning footprints.
partnerSkill: Ignis Charge - Rushes at enemies dealing Fire damage.

name: Loupmoon
description: A wolf-like Dark Pal that howls at the moon and leads packs of smaller Pals.
partnerSkill: Crescent Fang - Deals bonus Dark damage when fighting alongside the player.

name: Loupmoon Cryst
description: The horns on its head are made of a mysterious ice that never melts. Shaved ice made by breaking off a horn is truly exquisite, but both the one who tries it and Loupmoon Cryst end up with a headache.
partnerSkill: Frozen Gleam Strike - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Snow Claw.

name: Galeclaw
description: A bird Pal with razor-sharp talons that rides the wind currents with effortless grace.
partnerSkill: Wind Claw Glider - Can be used as a glider to travel long distances.

name: Robinquill
description: A robin-like Leaf Pal that is an expert archer and defends its territory with precision.
partnerSkill: Hawk Eye - Boosts the player's ranged attack accuracy.

name: Robinquill Terra
description: An earthy variant of Robinquill that fires arrows made of hardened stone.
partnerSkill: Terra Hawk Eye - Boosts accuracy and penetration of ranged attacks.

name: Gorirat
description: A gorilla-like Pal of immense strength that challenges any intruder to a wrestling match.
partnerSkill: Power Throw - Picks up and hurls boulders at enemies.

name: Gorirat Terra
description: It communicates with its friends through rhythmic tapping on the ground. Stronger than Gorirat. If every Gorirat Terra hit the ground at the same time, the island would sink in 1 second.
partnerSkill: Full-Power Gorilla Mode - When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat Terra's Attack for a limited time.

name: Beegarde
description: A bee-like Leaf Pal that guards its hive with fanatic devotion and sacrificial attacks.
partnerSkill: Beegarde Guard - Orbits the player and attacks nearby enemies.

name: Elizabee
description: A regal queen bee Pal that commands its Beegarde swarm with unwavering authority.
partnerSkill: Queen's Orders - Commands Beegarde allies to focus attacks.

name: Grintale
description: A large predatory Pal with a perpetual grin that swallows prey whole without hesitation.
partnerSkill: Bottomless Stomach - Increases the player's max food capacity.

name: Swee
description: A small fluffy Ice Pal that looks like a snowball and is adored for its cuteness.
partnerSkill: Blizzard Spike - Fires ice shards at enemies.

name: Sweepa
description: A large Ice Pal evolved from Swee that controls snowstorms with ease.
partnerSkill: Blizzard Spike King - Fires powerful ice shards while being ridden.

name: Chillet
description: A serpentine Ice-Dragon Pal that slithers across ice and wraps foes in frozen coils.
partnerSkill: Icy Coil - Slows enemies caught in its freezing grip.

name: Chillet Ignis
description: When curled up it spins so fast that sparks fly. Sparks also fly when it feels excited. If you stroke it too much, sparks fly!
partnerSkill: Sparkling Weasel - Can be ridden. Converts player attacks to Fire element while mounted.

name: Univolt
description: A horse-like Electric Pal with a glowing horn that moves as fast as lightning.
partnerSkill: Swift Thunder - Greatly increases movement speed when mounted.

name: Foxcicle
description: An arctic fox Pal surrounded by ice crystals that is elegant and frigid.
partnerSkill: Frozen Waltz - Freezes enemies hit by the player's attacks.

name: Pyrin
description: A majestic Fire horse Pal with a blazing mane that is swift and powerful.
partnerSkill: Fire Rider - Can be ridden and sets enemies on fire.

name: Pyrin Noct
description: A dark variant of Pyrin that blazes with black flames and is most fearsome at night.
partnerSkill: Dark Fire Rider - Can be ridden and burns enemies with dark fire.

name: Reindrix
description: An ice reindeer Pal with striking blue antlers that can carry riders across snowy terrain.
partnerSkill: Frozen Reindeer - Increases movement speed in snowy areas.

name: Rayhound
description: A dog-like Electric Pal that runs at the speed of electricity and crackles with power.
partnerSkill: Lightning Dash - Dashes forward dealing Electric damage to foes in its path.

name: Kitsun
description: A fox Pal with brilliant flame tails and a mysterious aura of ancient power.
partnerSkill: Clear Mind - Nullifies temperature effects while mounted.

name: Kitsun Noct
description: Despite its appearance, Kitsun Noct is extremely sensitive and will flee into a cave when spooked. It has become quite gloomy from being a shut-in for too long.
partnerSkill: Fogged Mind - Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

name: Dazzi
description: A tiny Electric Pal that sparkles like a star and is loved for its cheerful personality.
partnerSkill: Zap Mode - Electrifies the player's attacks dealing bonus damage.

name: Dazzi Noct
description: Often kind to lonely Pals, it plots to lure them into dropping their guard before striking them down. Yet, unable to find the right moment, it ends up making friends with them instead.
partnerSkill: Lady of Dark Lightning - While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.

name: Lunaris
description: A moon-shaped Pal that floats gently and amplifies nearby work using lunar energy.
partnerSkill: Lunar Boost - Boosts the attack power of allies under moonlight.

name: Dinossom
description: A dinosaur-like Leaf Pal covered in blooming flowers that channels plant energy.
partnerSkill: Petal Burst - Scatters flower petals that slow enemies.

name: Dinossom Lux
description: An electric variant of Dinossom whose flowers crackle with lightning.
partnerSkill: Electric Petal Burst - Scatters electrically charged petals at enemies.

name: Melpaca
description: An alpaca-like Pal with fluffy wool that is calm and easy to raise.
partnerSkill: Fleece Cloud - Produces Wool when assigned to a Ranch.

name: Surfent
description: A water serpent Pal that patrols the seas and is an excellent swimmer.
partnerSkill: Sea Glider - Can be ridden on water as a sea mount.

name: Surfent Terra
description: An earthy variant of Surfent that burrows through rock and earth at high speed.
partnerSkill: Earth Glider - Can be ridden to tunnel through the ground.

name: Maraith
description: A wraith-like Dark Pal that haunts the dead of night and absorbs life energy.
partnerSkill: Life Drain - Steals HP from enemies and transfers it to the player.

name: Digtoise
description: A turtle-like Earth Pal with a drill-like shell that spins at high speed to bore through rock.
partnerSkill: Drill Crush - Spins its shell like a drill and slams into enemies.

name: Tombat
description: A bat Pal that lives in dark caves and uses sonic screams to disorient its prey.
partnerSkill: Echolocation - Detects hidden enemies and items nearby.

name: Lovander
description: A heart-shaped Pal that exudes pheromones and attempts to steal the hearts of all it meets.
partnerSkill: Heart Drain - Attacks enemies with hearts that restore the player's HP.

name: Flambelle
description: A small fairy-like Fire Pal whose body is made entirely of flame.
partnerSkill: Flame Organ - Produces Flame Organs when assigned to a Ranch.

name: Vanwyrm
description: A wyvern-like Fire-Dark Pal that rules the volcanic skies with terrifying speed.
partnerSkill: Aerial Marauder - Can be ridden as a flying mount that attacks with fire.

name: Vanwyrm Cryst
description: An icy dark variant of Vanwyrm that descends from frozen peaks like a blizzard.
partnerSkill: Frozen Marauder - Can be ridden as a flying mount that attacks with ice.

name: Bushi
description: A samurai-like Fire Pal that wields a blazing katana with unmatched skill.
partnerSkill: Warrior of Fire - Boosts the player's attack speed while nearby.

name: Bushi Noct
description: Its body becomes a blade upon death, to be taken up by the next generation. If the Bushi who inherits it has a weak heart, the voices of the dead will drive it mad. The madness turns it into Bushi Noct that endlessly wanders.
partnerSkill: Flash Blade - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

name: Beakon
description: A massive Electric eagle Pal and one of the fastest flying mounts in existence.
partnerSkill: Lightning Strike - Attacks enemies from above while the player rides it.

name: Ragnahawk
description: A phoenix-like Fire Pal that soars through volcanic skies leaving trails of flame.
partnerSkill: Flame Wing - Can be ridden and sets enemies ablaze during flight.

name: Katress
description: A witch-cat Dark Pal that brews dark potions and casts hexes on unsuspecting travelers.
partnerSkill: Dark Witch - Enhances the effects of items used during battle.

name: Katress Ignis
description: Due to its upbringing, it no longer cares about whether its food is raw enough. This Pal stopped worrying about those details, and just prefers its food to be as spicy as possible. Not on good terms with Wixen Noct.
partnerSkill: Botanical Atlas - While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

name: Wixen
description: A fox-like Fire Pal that wields magical fire and enchants foes with illusions.
partnerSkill: Fox Fire - Shoots fox fire projectiles that home in on enemies.

name: Wixen Noct
description: Due to its upbringing, it no longer cares about whether its food is cooked enough. Just prefers its food to be as sweet as possible. Not on good terms with Katress Ignis.
partnerSkill: Black Fox Lord - While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.

name: Verdash
description: A swift Leaf Pal that dashes through forests at incredible speed leaving a trail of leaves.
partnerSkill: Wind Cutter - Unleashes slicing gales while the player rides it.

name: Vaelet
description: An elegant Leaf Pal resembling a flower fairy that purifies the air and heals allies.
partnerSkill: Purifying Breeze - Removes debuffs from the player.

name: Sibelyx
description: A serpentine Ice Pal with fur like silk that produces cloth-like fibers from its body.
partnerSkill: Silky Smooth - Produces Cloth when assigned to a Ranch.

name: Elphidran
description: A gentle dragon Pal with wide wings who prefers peaceful grazing over fighting.
partnerSkill: Aerial Guide - Can be ridden as a flying mount.

name: Elphidran Aqua
description: An aquatic variant of Elphidran that gracefully glides through ocean skies.
partnerSkill: Aqua Aerial Guide - Can be ridden as a flying water mount.

name: Kelpsea
description: A small seahorse-like Water Pal that is often found riding ocean currents.
partnerSkill: Kelp Boost - Increases movement speed in water.

name: Kelpsea Ignis
description: A fiery variant of Kelpsea that burns with underwater flames.
partnerSkill: Fire Boost - Increases fire damage output.

name: Azurobe
description: A graceful sea dragon with sapphire-blue scales that is legendary among sailors.
partnerSkill: Tidal Wave - Rides into battle mounted on this Pal across water.

name: Azurobe Cryst
description: This Pal's white ribbon continuously absorbs heat from its surroundings, yet its temperature remains curiously unchanged. This strange ability once made it a target of relentless hunting, leaving it with a deep mistrust of humans to this day.
partnerSkill: Icewing Dance - Can be ridden to travel on water. Changes the player's attack type to Ice while mounted.

name: Cryolinx
description: A fierce lynx Pal encased in living ice that hunts prey across frozen tundra.
partnerSkill: Ice Fangs - Freezes enemies with each bite when fighting alongside the player.

name: Cryolinx Terra
description: It can easily carry many items with its large hands. However, its short legs slow its pace, often leaving it overtaken by nightfall.
partnerSkill: Electro Hunter - While fighting together, Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

name: Blazehowl
description: A fierce wolf-like Fire Pal whose howl is said to ignite the very air around it.
partnerSkill: Inferno Howl - Boosts attack power while letting out a howl of flames.

name: Blazehowl Noct
description: A nocturnal variant of Blazehowl whose dark flames grow stronger at night.
partnerSkill: Dark Inferno Howl - Boosts dark and fire attacks with its howl.

name: Relaxaurus
description: A large laid-back dragon Pal who is always happy and can fire missiles from its back.
partnerSkill: Missile Party - Fires missiles from its back while being ridden.

name: Relaxaurus Lux
description: An electric variant of Relaxaurus that fires electric missiles with cheerful abandon.
partnerSkill: Electric Missile Party - Fires electric missiles from its back while being ridden.

name: Broncherry
description: A large herbivore Leaf Pal covered in cherry blossoms that blooms in spring.
partnerSkill: Blossom Shower - Rains cherry blossom petals that heal the player.

name: Broncherry Aqua
description: An aquatic variant of Broncherry that blooms with water lilies and swims gracefully.
partnerSkill: Aqua Blossom Shower - Rains water-infused petals that heal and restore.

name: Petallia
description: A flower-based Leaf Pal that nurtures all plant life around it with gentle care.
partnerSkill: Harvest Goddess - Greatly boosts crop yield when assigned to a farm.

name: Reptyro
description: A volcanic dinosaur Pal with molten rock embedded in its hide that melts ore effortlessly.
partnerSkill: Miner's Best Friend - Increases mining efficiency when fighting alongside it.

name: Reptyro Cryst
description: A frozen variant of Reptyro with glacial armor that excavates frozen mineral deposits.
partnerSkill: Cryst Miner - Mines frozen ore deposits with icy precision.

name: Kingpaca
description: A massive alpaca Pal who rules over all Melpaca and produces extraordinary amounts of wool.
partnerSkill: King's Wool - Produces large quantities of Wool and High Quality Pal Oil.

name: Kingpaca Cryst
description: An icy variant of Kingpaca whose frosted wool shimmers with embedded ice crystals.
partnerSkill: Cryst King's Wool - Produces wool and ice organs in frigid conditions.

name: Mammorest
description: A massive elephant-like Leaf Pal that rules the forests and flattens anything in its path.
partnerSkill: Gaia's Wrath - Deals massive Earth damage when the player rides into enemies.

name: Mammorest Cryst
description: A glacial variant of Mammorest coated in permafrost that generates blizzards.
partnerSkill: Cryst Gaia's Wrath - Deals massive Ice damage when ridden into enemies.

name: Wumpo
description: A yeti-like Ice Pal of enormous size that roams frozen mountains and protects its territory.
partnerSkill: Wumpo's Endurance - Increases the player's maximum carrying capacity.

name: Wumpo Botan
description: A leafy variant of Wumpo covered in vines and flowers that nurtures the forest.
partnerSkill: Botan's Endurance - Increases carrying capacity and plant gathering.

name: Warsect
description: A beetle-like Pal encased in a living fortress of bark and stone armor.
partnerSkill: Hard Shield - Reduces damage taken while the player fights nearby.

name: Warsect Terra
description: The ultra-hard armor surrounding its body is extremely strong and heat resistant. It doesn't flinch even if a Mammorest steps on it.
partnerSkill: Fortified Shell - While fighting together, increases the player's defense and reduces damage received from Fire.

name: Fenglope
description: A graceful antelope Pal whose speed is unmatched among land creatures.
partnerSkill: Wind and Clouds - Allows jumping in mid-air while mounted.

name: Fenglope Lux
description: In ages past, it was believed that drawing a picture of Fenglope Lux would result in being struck down by lightning.
partnerSkill: Stormcloud - Rideable with double jump capability while mounted. Water-type Pals drop increased items when defeated while fighting together.

name: Felbat
description: A large bat Dark Pal that can be ridden through the night sky on silent wings.
partnerSkill: Life Steal - Absorbs the life force of enemies hit while riding.

name: Quivern
description: A playful wyvern-type dragon Pal that hovers joyfully and loves to play with its trainer.
partnerSkill: Sky Dragon's Affection - Can be ridden as a flying mount.

name: Quivern Botan
description: When you hug Quivern Botan, if it smells like sunshine and meadows, tomorrow will be sunny. If it smells damp, tomorrow will be wet and miserable.
partnerSkill: Grass Dragon Affection - Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

name: Blazamut
description: A giant Fire Pal made of molten rock that erupts with explosive power.
partnerSkill: Magma Irisfang - Can be ridden and performs a devastating fire charge.

name: Blazamut Ryu
description: Long ago, it emerged from the depths of the earth. With relentless, raging flames showing no mercy, it burned the entire island until nothing remained.
partnerSkill: Dragon Kaiser - Can be ridden. Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.

name: Helzephyr
description: A terrifying Dark Pal that rules the night skies and can be ridden through darkness.
partnerSkill: Messenger of Death - Can be ridden as a flying mount that spreads fear.

name: Helzephyr Lux
description: It calls forth lightning from the depths of hell. While considered a subspecies of Helzephyr, there's a theory that suggests Helzephyr Lux, struck by lightning from hell, will transform into Helzephyr.
partnerSkill: Wings of Thunder - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

name: Astegon
description: A draconic Dark Pal that mines ancient ore with its horns and hoards rare minerals.
partnerSkill: Black Ankylosaur - Greatly boosts mining efficiency when riding it.

name: Menasting
description: A scorpion-like Dark-Earth Pal with a venomous tail that pierces any armor.
partnerSkill: Steel Scorpion - Increases the player's defense when fighting nearby.

name: Menasting Terra
description: The main body is an entity made of energy, with nothing inside. It stuffs earth and minerals into its outer shell, achieving overwhelming mass.
partnerSkill: Steel Scorpion - While fighting together, increases the player's defense and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

name: Anubis
description: A powerful Earth Pal in the form of an ancient guardian deity who judges all life.
partnerSkill: Guardian of the Desert - Increases the player's defense and attack power.

name: Jormuntide
description: A massive sea serpent Pal of mythical proportions that commands the ocean itself.
partnerSkill: Stormbringer Sea Dragon - Can be ridden on water and unleashes mighty waves.

name: Jormuntide Ignis
description: A volcanic variant of Jormuntide that breathes rivers of molten fire across the land.
partnerSkill: Stormbringer Fire Dragon - Can be ridden and unleashes devastating fire waves.

name: Suzaku
description: A legendary phoenix Pal bathed in sacred flames that soars across the sky.
partnerSkill: Wings of Fire - Can be ridden as a flying mount that scorches all below.

name: Suzaku Aqua
description: An aquatic variant of Suzaku that glides across ocean surfaces with divine grace.
partnerSkill: Wings of Water - Can be ridden as an aquatic flying mount.

name: Grizzbolt
description: A large electric bear Pal that carries a minigun and is an unstoppable force.
partnerSkill: Pal Mechanics - Can operate machinery more efficiently.

name: Lyleen
description: A graceful Leaf Pal who is revered as the overlord of the world of plants.
partnerSkill: Harvest Goddess - Greatly boosts farm yield and heals the player.

name: Lyleen Noct
description: A nocturnal variant of Lyleen that blooms only under moonlight with dark flowers.
partnerSkill: Night Harvest Goddess - Boosts farm yield at night and drains enemy life.

name: Faleris
description: A blazing bird Pal of ancient legend whose every feather burns like a torch.
partnerSkill: Scorching Feathers - Can be ridden and sets a wide area ablaze.

name: Faleris Aqua
description: When it finds its prey, it unleashes a mighty torrent, sweeping the entire area. More often than not, the prey gets swept away in the chaos, leaving one to wonder whether this truly counts as hunting.
partnerSkill: Tidal Predator - Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

name: Orserk
description: A terrifyingly powerful Electric-Dragon Pal that generates infinite electricity.
partnerSkill: Divine Thunderstrike - Generates a massive electric storm when riding it.

name: Shadowbeak
description: A godlike Dark Pal feared as a harbinger of doom whose screech shakes the earth.
partnerSkill: Modified DNA - Can be ridden as the fastest flying mount in existence.

name: Paladius
description: A divine Pal of legend that embodies light and righteousness in every action.
partnerSkill: Lord of the Seas - Can be ridden as a powerful unicorn-like land mount.

name: Necromus
description: An accursed dark counterpart to Paladius that embodies shadow and death.
partnerSkill: Lord of the Underworld - Can be ridden as a fearsome dark land mount.

name: Frostallion
description: A legendary divine horse Pal of pure ice and snow that is the ruler of all frozen lands.
partnerSkill: Ice Wind of the Great Tundra - Can be ridden as the most powerful ice flying mount.

name: Frostallion Noct
description: A shadowy variant of Frostallion that rides the dark skies and commands the night.
partnerSkill: Dark Wind of the Great Tundra - Can be ridden as the most powerful dark flying mount.

name: Jetragon
description: The ultimate Dragon Pal of tremendous power who is the fastest creature in existence.
partnerSkill: Aerial Missile - The fastest flying mount, fires a barrage of missiles.

name: Bellanoir
description: Without existing, she quietly gazed upon the world. One day, she was seized with a longing to be seen. With unbridled lust for vengeance against reality, thus was born the eclipsed siren.
partnerSkill: Nightmare Iris - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Nightmare Ray.

name: Bellanoir Libero
description: A more powerful form of Bellanoir, wearing a flowing black gown with pinkish-purple flames beneath. Its single visible blue eye burns with a more intense hunger.
partnerSkill: Nightmare Stare - When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Nightmare Bloom.

name: Selyne
description: The object floating behind, resembling the moon, is said to gradually become more circular with each generation.
partnerSkill: Celestial Darkness - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Neutral and Dark element attacks while mounted.

name: Croajiro
description: Those who disgrace the honor of the herd are forced to take their own life. By piercing their inflated vocal sac with a tree branch, they are blown away into the atmosphere and return to the afterlife.
partnerSkill: Leap Stance - When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels loyalty to build energy. Climbing on top launches the player high into the air.

name: Croajiro Noct
description: The Croajiro who have forsaken their honor gather and form splinter groups. They will use any underhanded means to take down their chosen prey.
partnerSkill: Shadow Stance - Inflates abdomen to launch players high into the air; increases Attack of Dark Pals in the party.

name: Lullu
description: A small plant-like creature that wears a dress of white and orange flower petals. Fills the farm with good spirits wherever it goes.
partnerSkill: Floral Boost - While at a base, Lullu fills the farm with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops.

name: Shroomer
description: A dinosaur-like Pal with a large red mushroom cap on its head. When stationed at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which allies lose SAN.
partnerSkill: Swooshy Spores - Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

name: Shroomer Noct
description: The abundance of spores released by this Pal blocks out sunlight. Sometimes, if Shroomer Noct appears motionless, it's not because it's mimicking a mushroom, but rather because its own spores don't let it see anything.
partnerSkill: Swooshy Spores - Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies decreases.

name: Kikit
description: A small armadillo-like Pal with a light tan body and a darker shell. Rolls into a ball to move quickly.
partnerSkill: Rollin' Full Oil - While in team, Kikit helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of crude oil in the player's inventory.

name: Sootseer
description: A ghostly Pal with a black body and wispy purple flames emanating from its hands and head. Occasionally digs up Bone when assigned to the ranch.
partnerSkill: Grave Robber - Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to the ranch.

name: Prixter
description: It has about 5,000 types of poison. Some of them are deadly enough to cause instant death, but all of them are too weak to have any effect.
partnerSkill: Scorpion Sonar - When activated, it can analyze airborne particles and find a dungeon's exit.

name: Knocklem
description: A large humanoid Pal encased in dark grey armor with gold highlights, carrying a detachable golden ring weapon. Its steel resolve inspires allies in battle.
partnerSkill: Steel Guardian Mode - When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's Attack and Defense for a limited time.

name: Yakumo
description: A small canine Pal with grey body and dark blue highlights. It has a strong sense of justice and despises evil.
partnerSkill: Birds of a Feather - Can be ridden. While fighting together, becomes easier to encounter pals with the same Passive Skill as Yakumo.

name: Dogen
description: A humanoid canine Pal with white fur and a red kasa hat, known for meditation and reflection on worldly desires. When activated, immediately teleports to the closest base.
partnerSkill: Homeward Prayer - When activated, moves to the closest base. Cannot be used within dungeons.

name: Dazemu
description: Take one step forward and forget your doubts. Take two steps forward and forget your worries. Take three steps forward and forget your fears. Face any enemy.
partnerSkill: Sand Sprint - Can be ridden. Runs faster over sand and dirt terrain.

name: Mimog
description: A Pal that mimics treasure chests. It reveals a face with blue eyes and a long tongue when active, fooling adventurers into thinking it's regular loot.
partnerSkill: Master of Unlocking - Allows Mimog to open locked copper-tier Treasure Chests without needing a key.

name: Xenovader
description: A bipedal reptilian Pal with a black body and purple markings, large claws, and sideways-facing purple horns. Appears during Meteorite Events.
partnerSkill: Meteor Mania - Enhances mining damage and increases the likelihood of obtaining Meteorite Fragments.

name: Xenogard
description: A quadrupedal draconic Pal with black body and pale grey armored plates. Its five tail crystals resonate with meteorites.
partnerSkill: Crater Enthusiast - Can be ridden. While in the team, it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment and Pure Quartz.

name: Xenolord
description: A large bipedal draconic Pal with dark grey body and bronze belly, featuring cobalt blue armor plating and four floating energy diamonds resembling wings.
partnerSkill: Meteor Wings - Serves as a flying mount that significantly boosts aerial movement speed.

name: Nitemary
description: What it carries is its own soul. When it falls for someone, it forcibly extracts their soul and merges it with its own.
partnerSkill: Soul Collector - While fighting together, Pals drop more Pal Souls when defeated.

name: Starryon
description: An equine Pal with a predominantly black body and blue mane. It takes immense pride in its flowing mane and becomes distressed over split ends.
partnerSkill: Night Dancer - Can be ridden. Increases movement speed while mounted at night.
locations: Feybreak (Scorched Hill, Frozen Coral Hill, nighttime)

name: Silvegis
description: A large quadrupedal dragon with a predominantly white body and golden armor. Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted.
partnerSkill: Aegis Shield - Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted.

name: Smokie
description: A small canine Pal with mostly black fur and wispy grey smoke coming from its head and tail. Skilled at sniffing out Chromite ore deposits.
partnerSkill: Dig, Dog! Dig! - Enables the user to detect nearby Chromite nodes and increases yield when mining them.

name: Celesdir
description: Ancient texts refer to it as the 'Beast of Salvation.' The light emitted by Celesdir purifies everything, literally causing things to vanish from existence without leaving a trace.
partnerSkill: Blessing of Purification - Can be ridden. Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.

name: Omascul
description: A penguin-shaped Pal with a white mask-like face hiding sharp teeth and four hidden arms. Its team experience bonus makes it invaluable for leveling.
partnerSkill: Masquerade Dance - While in team, the Pals in the team gain more experience points.

name: Splatterina
description: It has an uncontrollable urge to tear its prey apart. Each individual has their own meticulous order for dismemberment.
partnerSkill: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion - Increases items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver on Pals while Splatterina is in the player's possession.

name: Tarantriss
description: Extremely sticky and clingy. The more it's resisted, the more tenacious it becomes.
partnerSkill: Tarantriss' Web - Serves as a rideable mount with double jump capability and the ability to shoot spider silk for grappling and high-speed movement.

name: Azurmane
description: A large equine Pal with azure blue body and black thunderbolt markings. Its glowing blue energy mane and tail crackle with raw electricity.
partnerSkill: Plasma Dash - Can be ridden. Also allows dashing in the air and moving at high speed.

name: Bastigor
description: The sight of anything round gives it an uncontrollable urge to punch it. For Bastigor the toughest challenge, after simply living, is making a snowman.
partnerSkill: Blizzard Crash - Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with an Ice-forged hammer.

name: Prunelia
description: Intelligent and graceful in its demeanor, it was frequently employed as an attendant by the island's nobles. However, when encountered at night, its face looked so eerie that it quickly fell out of favor.
partnerSkill: Prayer for Abundant Harvest - While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest.

name: Nyafia
description: A humanoid feline Pal with light grey fur and bright magenta hair that covers its right eye. When activated, fires a shotgun at nearby enemies.
partnerSkill: Shot-Nyan Mode - When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time.

name: Gildane
description: During the golden age of alchemy on the island, its ever-glowing golden fur was highly prized as a catalyst for transmuting gold.
partnerSkill: Sandstorm's Blessing - Can be ridden; converts player's attack type to Ground element while mounted.

name: Herbil
description: When in doubt, punch it till it works — that's Herbil's approach to fixing things. With strength perfectly tuned for humans, sometimes just one punch is enough to restart a stopped heart.
partnerSkill: Herbil Pulse - While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacitated.

name: Icelyn
description: A semi-humanoid Pal wearing a wide-brimmed witch's hat adorned with ice crystals and a white dress with light blue highlights. Changes the player's attack type to Ice when fighting together.
partnerSkill: Witch's Icy Veil - While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ice.

name: Frostplume
description: So precise is its sense of time that it awakens at the exact same hour every morning. According to Palpagos lore, a day was divided into 24 parts because when Frostplume spreads its tail feathers wide, it reveals a pattern with 24 distinct spaces.
partnerSkill: Peacock Pounce - Frostplume's icy aura sharpens your focus, improving reload speed.

name: Palumba
description: Disrupts enemies' rhythm with a signature dance. In turf battles, the first to fall in sync with the other's rhythm loses.
partnerSkill: Samba Step - Can be ridden and runs faster over grass terrain.

name: Braloha
description: A large sauropod-like Pal with tan body and green markings. When stationed at a base breeding farm, shortens the time it takes Pals to produce eggs.
partnerSkill: Balmy Weather - Can be ridden. While at a base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to BreedFarm to produce eggs.

name: Munchill
description: The inside of its mouth stays pleasantly cold, making it a natural fridge when closed. A small reptilian Pal with a round body and four stubby legs.
partnerSkill: Icy Maw - While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.

name: Polapup
description: Among Polapups, the fastest slider on the snow earns the highest respect. Sometimes, a too-forceful leap sends one tumbling from the sky — a common sight during territorial season.
partnerSkill: Rider of the Snowy Mountain - Can be ridden. Runs faster over snow. Can slide quickly down slopes.

name: Turtacle
description: To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredibly tough shell. Unfortunately, it's utterly defenseless underneath. Even a little tickle could knock it out cold.
partnerSkill: Spikey Carrier - While in team, Turtacle helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.

name: Turtacle Terra
description: To protect its fragile body, it developed an incredibly tough shell. With most of its senses concentrated in its limbs and shell, it can't even tell if someone quietly touches its core.
partnerSkill: Shiny Hauler - Decreases armor weight in player inventory while in team; also boosts Attack of Ground-type Pals.

name: Jellroy
description: A Pal that closely resembles Jelliette. It sometimes appears as a substitute when Jelliette is unavailable. Its acting is so flawless that no one ever notices the switch.
partnerSkill: Jellroy Drop - While in your team, increases salvage item yields. When stationed at a base alongside Jelliette, boosts watering speed.

name: Jelliette
description: A small humanoid jellyfish-like Pal with a predominantly white body and long flowing white tentacles on its head. While Jelliette and Jellroy are together at a base, Jelliette's watering speed increases.
partnerSkill: Jelliette Drop - While in team, increases items obtained from fishing. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed is increased.

name: Gloopie
description: Be sure to check your plans for the next day before falling asleep with this Pal. Its suction cups leave marks that look suspiciously like hickeys.
partnerSkill: Sticky Princess - The capture gauge decreases more slowly in the fishing minigame when the bar is not aligned.

name: Finsider
description: It looks like something is peeking out from inside a costume, but even if you reach inside, there's nothing there. In fact, you can keep reaching deeper and deeper. Perhaps the universe itself lies within.
partnerSkill: Echo Chamber - While in team, Finsider helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory.

name: Finsider Ignis
description: Finsider Ignis has a predominantly pink body with red dorsal and tail fins. Its fiery nature also boosts the Attack of Fire Pals in the team.
partnerSkill: Ember Chamber - While in team, decreases the weight of weapons in the player's inventory. Also increases Attack of Fire Pals.

name: Ghangler
description: With its shining lure, it illuminates the darkness. An anglerfish-like Pal with a skull-like mask and four horn-like protrusions.
partnerSkill: Master Night Angler - Enables riding for water travel and reduces the time for Pals to bite during nighttime fishing.

name: Ghangler Ignis
description: Its blazing lure doubles as a grill for roasting prey. Drawn in by the delicious aroma, Pals have no hope of escape once Ghangler Ignis sets its sights on them.
partnerSkill: Flame Lantern - Can be ridden to travel quickly across water. While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

name: Whalaska
description: A large whale-like Pal with a light blue upper body and white lower body with a white goatee on its chin. Starts the fishing minigame with the capture gauge higher than usual.
partnerSkill: Chilled Whale Cruiser - Can be ridden. While fighting together, the fishing minigame starts with the capture gauge higher than usual.

name: Whalaska Ignis
description: Determined never to be mistaken for drift ice again, it turned bright red through sheer will. Unfortunately, some Pals can't see red. So despite its efforts, its personal space continues to be invaded.
partnerSkill: Cozy Whale Cruiser - Rideable mount that enhances fishing mechanics by starting the capture gauge higher and increasing its fill rate.

name: Neptilius
description: A large whale-like Pal with a predominantly grey body and a white and blue underbelly, featuring azure gemstones with golden rims and a golden crown-like structure on its head.
partnerSkill: Sentinel of the Great Sea - Enables spear strike follow-ups during combat and allows riding across water with high-altitude leaping capability.
locations: Isle of the Glacial Core (Alpha only, coordinates 139, 651)

name: Hartalis
description: The silence is unsettling, yet strangely soothing. No one else remains. All have been delivered. O King of Salvation, carry me too into eternal stillness.
partnerSkill: Sacred Barrier - Can be ridden. While mounted, generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.
